message:
test(core): add 8 composite proptest properties for runtime_compat multi-primitive interactions

Test cross-primitive behavior patterns:
- spawn_blocking + join! concurrent execution
- select! with channel + timeout ordering
- Mutex + spawn concurrent accumulation
- Channel fan-in collecting from multiple senders
- Semaphore + spawn bounded concurrency
- Watch + select! latest-value observation
- spawn_blocking inside select! completion
- Notify + spawn task resumption

Total: 64 proptest properties in proptest_runtime_compat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
